## Description

Please describe the changes proposed in this Pull Request (e.g., what bug was fixed, what typo was corrected, what generator improvement was added, etc.).

## Related Issue

Fixes # (link the issue here, e.g., Fixes #123)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue with the site layout, content, or generator)
- [ ] Layout / Style improvement
- [ ] Typo correction / content improvement in a post
- [ ] Feature / enhancement for the site generator
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Verification

Please describe how you verified your changes locally:

### Static Site / Generator
- [ ] Ran the local dev server using `./dev.sh` and checked page rendering at `http://localhost:8082`
- [ ] Checked responsive layout (mobile/tablet/desktop viewports) for any layout/CSS changes
- [ ] Ran `uv run build.py` and verified it compiles the entire site without errors/warnings

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](file:///.github/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] If changing posts, I followed the markdown front-matter structure.
- [ ] I wrote clear and descriptive commit messages.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (if applicable).
